data.title: ZITRO'S NEW FANTASY CABINET MAKES A PHENOMENAL U.S. DEBUT
data.description: Zitro's newest slot cabinet, FANTASY, has had a promising start in the U.S., with strong player response and solid floor performance marking its early days. The cabinet has received positive feedback across multiple states, leading to an optimistic rollout. The company is pleased with the initial outcome, indicating a hopeful future for FANTASY. The U.S. debut has been highly anticipated, and initial numbers show a positive trend for Zitro's latest offering.

data.title: Talkpool resolves on a directed share issue of EUR 1.65 million to a group of strategic investors led by Applied Invest Nordics
data.description: In CHUR, Switzerland, on March 27, 2026, the Board of Directors of Talkpool AG announced a decision to conduct a new share issue based on approval received during the Annual General Meeting held on September 15, 2025. This initiative deviates from previous protocols and indicates a significant strategic move by the company.
